sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Cold Creek Pond and Cold Creek: Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Cold Creek, Spring Mountains, Nevada — FisherDad
sources.quotedText: Cold Creek is a small stream in the Spring Mountains, Clark County, that flows through the community of Cold Creek and holds a population of rainbow trout.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County (Cold Creek Pond and Cold Creek)
regulations.humanSummary: Cold Creek is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated for Cold Creek; the limit applies to the combined daily/possession total across all game fish species (in practice, rainbow trout is the primary sport fish present).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County (Cold Creek Pond and Cold Creek)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) on Cold Creek.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: Fishing is permitted any hour of the day or night on Cold Creek, per NDOW's Clark County regulation table.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County (Cold Creek Pond and Cold Creek)
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed any hour of the day or night on Cold Creek.
regulations.verbatimText: Any hour of the day or night

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
